title: Azhage Bhrammanidam Lyrics Devathaiyai Kanden
stanzas:
azhage bhrammanidam
1manu kodukka poirundhen
nee en manaiviyaaga
vaendum endru

aandu pala kaathirukka
vendum endru avan sonnaan
aayul varai kaathiruppen
endru naanu solli vanthen

enaasai niraiverumaa
en thozhi neeyum sollammaa
nadakkum nadakkum
naankooda solgiraen

unai naan sumappadhinaal
idhayamum karuvaithaan
manadhaal naanum annaiye
maraven endrum unnaiye

naan paalai vanathil vidhaipol
nee paruvam thandha mazhaipol
en kadhal sediyil poovum
pooththathe

unvizhi thirandhirunthaal
vidiyalae thaevayillai
unai naan thurandhirundhaal
uyir adhu sondhamillai

yaen indha piravi endru
idhuvarai ninaithirundhen
uyire unnai paarthadhum
ulagae pudhiyathaanadhe

enai padaitha andha dheivam
enai sumandha annai dheivam
ivai irandum unnthan kannil
parkkiren

paruvangal oadipogum
uruvangal maaripogum
unmeedhu konda kaadhal
uyiraiyum thaandi vaazhum

azhage bhrammanidam
manu kodukka poirundhen
nee en manaiviyaaga
vaendum endru

aandu pala kaathirukka
vendum endru avan sonnaan
aayul varai kaathiruppen
endru naanu solli vanthen

enaasai niraiverumaa
en thozhi neeyum sollammaa
nadakkum nadakkum
naankooda solgiraen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions of a lover waiting for their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Devathaiyai Kanden, this song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and his devotion to his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 14, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhage Bhrammanidam, the protagonist expresses his deep love and yearning for his beloved, creating a poignant atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love, making it perfect for intimate moments and celebrations. As part of the movie Devathaiyai Kanden, it plays a crucial role in highlighting the character's emotional struggles and devotion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhage Bhrammanidam from the movie Devathaiyai Kanden is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra's soulful voice and Deva's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into the emotional depth of this track that beautifully blends heartfelt lyrics with a soothing tune.
stanzaMeanings: I have come to give my life to you, as you are meant to be my wife.
He said that I must wait for many years, and I told him that I will wait until the end of my life.
Will my desires be fulfilled? You too will say that, and I am saying this along with you.
By loving you, my heart has become heavy, and I will never forget you, my mother.
You are like the rain that brings life, and my love blooms like flowers in the garden.
If your eyes are open, there is no need for dawn; if I open up to you, my life will have no meaning.
Will all this be enough? I am saying this along with you.
Why have I been thinking about this life? Seeing you is a new experience for me.
The god who created me and the mother goddess who surrounds me, I see both of them in your eyes.
Seasons will change, forms will change, but true love will live on.
Will everything I say happen? I am saying this along with you.
I have come to give my life to you, as you are meant to be my wife.
He said that I must wait for many years, and I told him that I will wait until the end of my life.
Will my desires be fulfilled? You too will say that, and I am saying this along with you.
